queries.query: Keiko Aurora retention snapshots archive continuity week-six churn
queries.rationale: Hybrid retrieval should stitch together long-horizon Aurora retention task, archival decision, and historical churn research.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: All expected memories share person/project/topic alignment for Aurora long-memory retention signals across different months.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should retrieve the three Aurora long-memory records near top ranks because the query spans their shared retention terms.

queries.rationale: Namespace-bound recall should isolate Vega reliability memories and avoid similarly themed records from other namespaces.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: Both expected IDs are the only records in the Vega namespace and intentionally separate from Aurora/Platform/Hermes namespaces.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should retrieve only Vega namespace records when namespace filter is applied.

queries.query: platform parser fallback status after cutover
queries.rationale: Temporal checkpoint after cutover should return only the post-cutover decision, excluding the expired temporary fallback task.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: Temporary fallback expires on 2026-01-20 while removal decision starts 2026-01-21, making the temporal boundary deterministic.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should include only the removal decision at valid_at 2026-01-22.

queries.rationale: Nonsense query text should not map to any synthetic medium fixture memory.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: The query intentionally contains unrelated tokens absent from all medium fixture records.

queries.query: partial readiness reason_code missing stale degraded generation_mismatch
queries.rationale: Lexical reason-code terms should align with Hermes partial-readiness decision and reason-code research memory.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: Expected IDs are the only medium records explicitly about partial readiness and reason code taxonomy.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should retrieve Hermes partial-readiness records for lexical reason-code queries.

queries.query: fixture id alias mapping canonical server generated remap
queries.rationale: Alias/remapping terminology should retrieve ID-mapping task and canonical fixture-ID decision together.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: These records specifically encode fixture-to-server ID remapping behavior and canonical label policy.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should retrieve alias/remap records for ID mismatch and mapping prompts.

queries.query: nested String wrapper record-shaped IDs normalization diagnostics
queries.rationale: Vector search should connect semantically similar record-shaped ID wrapper and normalization memories.

label_rationale.why_label_is_correct: Both expected records discuss object-wrapped/String-form identifiers and normalization for ranking diagnostics.
label_rationale.expected_behavior: Should retrieve record-shaped ID normalization context for semantic wrapper-ID queries.
